backend/main.mo: Main actor defining ride-sharing types (UserProfile, Trip, roles, locations) with Maps for storage, access control integration, and CRUD operations for user profiles and trips including role-based authorization checks.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old data structures to new ones by adding isVerified field to UserProfile (defaulting to null) and transmissionType field to Trip (defaulting to #manual).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the update to AvailableTripsSection component to display backend-filtered trips without client-side filtering, referencing useQueries.ts hook.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including dashboards, forms, trip lists, navigation, authentication flows, and styling with earth-tone OKLCH color system.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with neutral grayscale tones and earth-tone accent colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Namma Driver Pilot application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup with root layout, role-based route guards that strictly redirect users to correct dashboards based on their role (customer/driver/admin), and ProfileSetupModal trigger logic.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin trips table displaying all trips with searchable pickup/dropoff locations, customer/driver emails via userMap lookup, color-coded status badges, and formatted location display.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Displays a searchable table of all users with their email, full name, role (with color-coded badges), and join date. Includes loading state and user count display.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Shows a scrollable list of requested trips for drivers to accept, displaying pickup/dropoff locations and creation time. Includes accept trip functionality with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Displays a customer's trip history with pickup/dropoff locations, status badges (color-coded by trip status), and creation timestamps. Shows loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Renders a driver's profile card showing service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, languages, earnings, and availability. Includes edit button and loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Shows a driver's accepted trips with pickup/dropoff locations, status badges, and a 'Mark as Completed' button for accepted trips. Includes loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: Form component for editing driver profile with inputs for service area, checkboxes for vehicle experience and transmission comfort, language input, and availability toggle. Validates and submits profile updates.
Dialog wrapper component that displays the EditDriverProfileForm in a modal with header and description. Handles open/close state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper providing navigation header, main content area, and footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution link. Uses flexbox for sticky footer.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Navigation header component that displays the app logo, user profile dropdown with role-based dashboard navigation, and logout functionality. Handles authentication state and redirects users to appropriate dashboards based on their role (admin/driver/customer).
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new user profile creation that collects email and full name, creates a UserProfile with default customer role, and prevents dismissal until completed. Uses form validation and displays toast notifications for success/error states.
Comprehensive ride booking form supporting local/outstation trips with one-way/round-trip options, manual or GPS-based location input, vehicle/transmission selection, duration configuration, and contact details. Includes validation, date/time calculations, and modal confirmations for journey types.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: Modal that enforces a 60-second countdown before allowing users to select their permanent role (customer or driver). Prevents dismissal and redirects to appropriate dashboard after role selection and lock.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on authentication state, initializing with anonymous or authenticated identity. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes and handles admin token initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor. Returns loading states and profile data, enabled only when actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and auth client lifecycle. Provides authentication status tracking and identity persistence across page reloads with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profiles, trips, and role management, including CRUD operations for customers, drivers, and admins. Provides hooks for creating trips, accepting/completing trips, and fetching user/trip data with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using earth tones and warm greens. Defines color schemes for UI components including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for viewing all users and trips. Displays counts and provides management interfaces through AdminUsersTab and AdminTripsTab components.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page with a two-column layout showing a ride request form and a list of the customer's trips with trip count.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page with tabs for available trips and accepted trips, plus a driver profile section with edit functionality. Displays trip counts and profile management modal.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with hero section and features showcasing the ride-booking platform. Handles authentication and redirects logged-in users to appropriate dashboards based on their role.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: Role selection page where new users choose between Customer and Driver roles. Automatically shows warning modal and redirects existing users to their role-specific dashboards.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to clear parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations (accordion), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document for 'Namma Driver Pilot' ride-booking MVP using React/Vite frontend and Supabase backend with role-based access (customer/driver/admin), tracking architectural decisions, implemented features, and database schema with RLS policies.
